dataset: CT Cranium (InVesalius Official Sample Data v3.0 0051)

pi_items.source: Verified through task.json and export_result.sh - path is correctly set and matches both task description and export script expectations
InVesalius 3 User Manual specifies Compact Bone (Adult) preset starts at 662 HU. Web search confirmed cortical bone range of 500-1900 HU with 660-1998 HU for compact bone in adults.
InVesalius 3 User Manual specifies 'Bone' preset maximum as 3021 HU (task uses 3071 which is ~50 HU above). This represents very dense cortical bone at upper limit of CT scale.
InVesalius 3 User Manual: 'Spongial Bone (Adult)' preset is exactly 148-661 HU. This is a standard, published preset in the official InVesalius documentation.
InVesalius 3 User Manual: 'Spongial Bone (Adult)' preset is exactly 148-661 HU. This is a standard, published preset in the official InVesalius documentation.
InVesalius 3 User Manual specifies 'Soft Tissue' preset as -700 to 225 HU. The task uses -700 which matches the preset minimum.
InVesalius 3 User Manual 'Soft Tissue' preset is -700 to 225 HU. Task specifies 147, which is a custom refinement within the preset range.

pi_items.metadata_value: CT Cranium (not specified in task.json metadata, but documented in evidence_docs/README.md)

pi_items.source: evidence_docs/README.md explicitly states: 'The DICOM series comes from the official InVesalius GitHub release asset v3.0/0051.zip and is staged under /opt/invesalius/sample_data/ct_cranium'
Data sourced from official InVesalius GitHub repository, not synthetically generated. Verified through evidence_docs/README.md which documents actual DICOM file acquisition and staging.

Specified consistently in task.json metadata for all three masks. No contradicting information found in medical literature or InVesalius documentation. Standard tolerance for clinical tissue segmentation.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real DICOM data from the official InVesalius 3 GitHub repository (v3.0 sample dataset 0051). The tissue segmentation thresholds are based on published InVesalius presets: Spongy_Bone (148-661 HU) exactly matches the InVesalius 'Spongial Bone (Adult)' preset; Dense_Bone (662-3071 HU) combines the Compact Bone minimum (662 HU) with an upper bound near the Bone preset (3021 HU), representing cortical bone; Soft_Tissue (-700 to 147 HU) refines the standard Soft Tissue preset (-700 to 225 HU). All threshold values are anatomically valid and consistent with medical imaging standards. The 50 HU tolerance for mask matching is appropriate for clinical tissue segmentation.
